Text: The author of the communication is A.G., a national of the Russian Federation. He claims that the State Party violated his rights under articles 14 to 17 of the Covenant.
On 18 June 2022, the communication was registered.

On 21 July 2022, the State Party submitted its observations on admissibility, which were transmitted to the author for comment on 19 October 2022. On 13 January 2023, the State Party submitted its observations on the merits, which were transmitted to the author for comment on 16 May 2023, together with a reminder to comment on the State Party’s observations on admissibility.

On 9 January 2024 and 11 February 2025, additional reminders were sent to the author to submit his comments on the State Party’s observations by 11 April 2025. The author was informed that, in the absence of a response, his communication might be discontinued.

On 17 July 2025, the Committee, in the light of the fact that it had received no response from the author, which whom it had lost contact, decided to discontinue its consideration of communication No. 4188/2022.
